description: Opens the [[Diary]] screen on the subject/record specified by link. To get a valid link format, use [[createDiaryLink]].
examples: <sqf>processDiaryLink createDiaryLink ["Tasks", (simpleTasks player) select 0, ""]; // Select a task in the Task menu</sqf>

<sqf>
// To select various tabs in the map screen:
processDiaryLink createDiaryLink ["selected_tab", player, ""];
// ... where "selected_tab" can be "Tasks", "Diary", "Units", "Players", "Statistics", other user created subjects
</sqf>
name: processDiaryLink
